overview: ChatHub is a social messaging platform where users can log in with Google, discover strangers to chat with, and hold real-time conversations. The clean, modern interface features a conversation sidebar, live online status, and a full message history panel — inspired by the familiar feel of Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter.
features: Google login / sign-up on the homepage
Real-time instant messaging with message history
Search to find and start new conversations
Persistent messages that reload on refresh
Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
